{{Infobox character
| name = Ulrok Crag-Strider
| aliases = Ulrok
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forger technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncrowned King]], Uncrowned King fighter}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|poet, philosopher, Ghost-Blade competitor}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ulrok Crag-Strider, also known as Ulrok, is a [[Ghost-Blade]] competitor who participated in an arena match against [[Mercy]]. Though he presents himself as a savage, animalistic fighter by snarling and charging his opponents like a bull, this behavior is a facade; in his home country, he is actually a celebrated philosopher and poet recognized for his writings on the soul. During combat, he utilizes a rough saber and employs [[Forger techniques]] by channeling gray-green madra into his weapon to create ghostly echoes. His fighting style involves rapid dashes and the ability to gather death [[aura]] and [[sword]] energy at specific points to strike his enemies.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A famous poet and philosopher in his homeland, Ulrok Crag-Strider traveled to compete in the [[Ghost-Blade]] tournament. As an [[Uncrowned King]] fighter, he wields a saber during combat. His fighting style utilizes a [[Forger technique]] that incorporates spiraling gray-green madra.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ulrok Crag-Strider]] is a [[Ghost-Blade]] competitor in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ulrok Crag-Strider]] is a famous poet and philosopher in his homeland.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ulrok Crag-Strider]] uses a [[Forger technique]] involving spiraling gray-green madra.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ulrok is an [[Uncrowned King]] fighter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ulrok uses a saber.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
